privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.s1body: We collect personal information you provide when applying for credit, including your name, identification, email, phone number, address, and financial information. We also collect usage data through cookies and analytics tools.
privacyPage.s2body: Your information is used to process credit applications, verify your identity, communicate with you about your account, improve our services, and comply with legal obligations.
privacyPage.s3body: We use industry-standard encryption and security measures to protect your personal data. Access to your information is restricted to authorized personnel only.
privacyPage.s4body: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share data with credit bureaus for evaluation purposes, and with service providers who assist in our operations under strict confidentiality agreements.
privacyPage.s5body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, please contact us through our contact page or by email.

termsPage.title: Terms and Conditions
termsPage.s1body: By using TuCreditoOnline services, you agree to these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not use our services.
termsPage.s2body: TuCreditoOnline provides an online platform for credit applications and financial services. All credit decisions are subject to our credit evaluation process and applicable regulations.
termsPage.s3body: Users must provide accurate and complete information, maintain the confidentiality of their account credentials, and use the platform only for lawful purposes.
termsPage.s4body: TuCreditoOnline is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our platform. Credit approval is not guaranteed and is subject to evaluation.
termsPage.s5body: These terms are governed by applicable financial regulations. Any disputes will be resolved through the appropriate legal channels in the jurisdiction where the service is provided.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: Learn about our history, mission and the team working to make your financial dreams come true

faqPage.heroSubtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our services
faqPage.g1a: TuCreditoOnline is a digital platform that allows you to apply for credits quickly and securely, 100% online, without needing to go to a physical branch.
faqPage.g2q: Is it safe to apply for credit online?
faqPage.g2a: Yes, completely safe. We use state-of-the-art encryption technology and comply with all banking security standards to protect your information.
faqPage.g3q: How long does it take to get my credit approved?
faqPage.g3a: The response is immediate for Express Credit (5-10 minutes). For Personal Credit, the process can take up to 24 hours depending on document validation.
faqPage.r1q: What do I need to apply for credit?
faqPage.r1a: Basic requirements are: be 18 years or older, have a valid official ID, proof of income and recent proof of address.
faqPage.r2q: Do I need to have credit history?
faqPage.r2a: For Express Credit it is not necessary. For Personal Credit and Refinancing, credit history is evaluated, but we consider other factors such as your current payment capacity.
faqPage.r3q: Can I apply for credit if I'm in the Credit Bureau?
faqPage.r3a: Yes, we evaluate each case individually. Being in the Bureau does not mean automatic rejection, we analyze your current situation and payment capacity.
faqPage.m1q: How much money can I request?
faqPage.m1a: It depends on the type of credit: Express up to $50,000, Personal up to $200,000 and Refinancing up to $300,000. The final amount will depend on your payment capacity.
faqPage.m2q: How can I pay my credit?
faqPage.m2a: We offer multiple options: bank direct debit, transfer, deposit at OXXO, 7-Eleven, or online payment with card.
faqPage.m3q: Can I pay off my credit early?
faqPage.m3a: Yes, we accept early payments without penalty. This will help you reduce the total interest on your credit.
faqPage.m4q: What happens if I can't pay on time?
faqPage.m4a: Contact us immediately. We offer restructuring options and flexible payment plans to help you in difficult situations.
faqPage.p1q: How does the application process work?
faqPage.p1a: 1) Complete the online form, 2) Upload your documents, 3) Wait for approval (5 min to 24 hrs), 4) Sign your contract digitally, 5) Receive your money.
faqPage.p2q: Do I need to go to a branch?
faqPage.p2a: No, the entire process is 100% online. From application to credit deposit, you don't need to leave home.
faqPage.p3q: How do I receive the money?
faqPage.p3a: The money is deposited directly into your bank account. For Express Credit the same day, for Personal Credit in 24-48 business hours.
faqPage.supportDesc: Our support team is available 24/7 to help you

legalPage.title: Legal Notice
legalPage.s1body: TuCreditoOnline operates under the financial regulations applicable in the jurisdiction where the service is provided. This legal notice is governed by the laws that regulate online financial services and consumer protection.
legalPage.s2body: TuCreditoOnline is authorized to provide online credit services in compliance with all applicable banking and financial regulations. All credit decisions are made in accordance with legal frameworks and responsible lending practices.
legalPage.s3body: We are committed to protecting your rights as a consumer. All transactions comply with financial consumer protection laws, including transparent disclosure of interest rates, fees, and contract terms.
legalPage.s4body: All content, trademarks, and materials on the TuCreditoOnline platform are the exclusive property of TuCreditoOnline or its licensors. Unauthorized reproduction or distribution is prohibited.
legalPage.s5body: TuCreditoOnline is provided on an "as is" basis. We disclaim all warranties, express or implied. TuCreditoOnline is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our platform or services.
